text_en: And there was war between Rehoboam and Jeroboam all the days of his life.
text_pt: E houve guerra entre Roboão e Jeroboão durante toda a vida de Abias.

text_en: Now the rest of the acts of Abijam, and all that he did, {are} they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah? And there was war between Abijam and Jeroboam.
text_pt: Os demais acontecimentos do reinado de Abias e todas as suas realizações estão escritos nos registros históricos dos reis de Judá. Também houve guerra entre Abias e Jeroboão.

text_en: And Abijam slept with his fathers; and they buried him in the city of David: and Asa his son reigned in his stead.
text_pt: E Abias descansou com os seus antepassados e foi sepultado na cidade de Davi. E o seu filho Asa foi o seu sucessor.

text_en: And in the twentieth year of Jeroboam king of Israel reigned Asa over Judah.
text_pt: No vigésimo ano do reinado de Jeroboão, rei de Israel, Asa tornou-se rei de Judá,

text_en: And forty and one years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother's name {was} Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom. {mother's: that is, grandmother's}
text_pt: e reinou quarenta e um anos em Jerusalém. O nome da sua avó era Maaca, filha de Absalão.

text_en: And Asa did {that which was} right in the eyes of the LORD, as {did} David his father.
text_pt: Asa fez o que o Senhor aprova, tal como Davi, seu predecessor.

text_en: And he took away the sodomites out of the land, and removed all the idols that his fathers had made.
text_pt: Expulsou do país os prostitutos cultuais e se desfez de todos os ídolos que seu pai havia feito.

text_en: And also Maachah his mother, even her he removed from {being} queen, because she had made an idol in a grove; and Asa destroyed her idol, and burnt {it} by the brook Kidron. {destroyed: Heb. cut off}
text_pt: Chegou até a depor sua avó Maaca da posição de rainha-mãe, pois ela havia feito um poste sagrado repugnante. Asa derrubou o poste e o queimou no vale do Cedrom.

text_en: But the high places were not removed: nevertheless Asa's heart was perfect with the LORD all his days.
text_pt: Embora os altares idólatras não tenham sido eliminados, o coração de Asa foi totalmente dedicado ao Senhor durante toda a sua vida.

text_en: And he brought in the things which his father had dedicated, and the things which himself had dedicated, into the house of the LORD, silver, and gold, and vessels. {things: Heb. holy}
text_pt: Ele trouxe para o templo do Senhor a prata, o ouro e os utensílios que ele e seu pai haviam consagrado.

text_en: And there was war between Asa and Baasha king of Israel all their days.
text_pt: Houve guerra entre Asa e Baasa, rei de Israel, durante todo o reinado deles.

text_en: And Baasha king of Israel went up against Judah, and built Ramah, that he might not suffer any to go out or come in to Asa king of Judah.
text_pt: Baasa, rei de Israel, invadiu Judá e fortificou Ramá, para que ninguém pudesse entrar nem sair do território de Asa, rei de Judá.

text_en: Then Asa took all the silver and the gold {that were} left in the treasures of the house of the LORD, and the treasures of the king's house, and delivered them into the hand of his servants: and king Asa sent them to Benhadad, the son of Tabrimon, the son of Hezion, king of Syria, that dwelt at Damascus, saying,
text_pt: Então Asa ajuntou a prata e o ouro que haviam sobrado no tesouro do templo do Senhor e do seu próprio palácio. Confiou tudo isso a alguns dos seus oficiais e os enviou a Ben-Hadade, filho de Tabriom e neto de Heziom, rei da Síria, que governava em Damasco,

text_en: {There is} a league between me and thee, {and} between my father and thy father: behold, I have sent unto thee a present of silver and gold; come and break thy league with Baasha king of Israel, that he may depart from me. {depart: Heb. go up}
text_pt: com uma mensagem que dizia: "Façamos um tratado, como fizeram meu pai e o teu. Estou te enviando como presente prata e ouro. Agora, rompe o tratado que tens com Baasa, rei de Israel, para que ele saia do meu país".

text_en: So Benhadad hearkened unto king Asa, and sent the captains of the hosts which he had against the cities of Israel, and smote Ijon, and Dan, and Abelbethmaachah, and all Cinneroth, with all the land of Naphtali.
text_pt: Ben-Hadade aceitou a proposta do rei Asa e ordenou aos comandantes das suas forças que atacassem as cidades de Israel. Ele conquistou Ijom, Dã, Abel-Bete-Maaca e todo o Quinerete, além de Naftali.

text_en: And it came to pass, when Baasha heard {thereof}, that he left off building of Ramah, and dwelt in Tirzah.
text_pt: Quando Baasa soube disso, abandonou a construção dos muros de Ramá e foi para Tirza.

text_en: Then king Asa made a proclamation throughout all Judah; none {was} exempted: and they took away the stones of Ramah, and the timber thereof, wherewith Baasha had builded; and king Asa built with them Geba of Benjamin, and Mizpah. {exempted: Heb. free}
text_pt: Então o rei Asa reuniu todos homens de Judá — ninguém foi isentado — e eles retiraram de Ramá as pedras e a madeira que Baasa estivera usando. Com esse material Asa fortificou Geba, em Benjamim, e também Mispá.

text_en: The rest of all the acts of Asa, and all his might, and all that he did, and the cities which he built, {are} they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah? Nevertheless in the time of his old age he was diseased in his feet.
text_pt: Os demais acontecimentos do reinado de Asa, todas as suas realizações, tudo o que fez e todas as cidades que construiu, tudo isso está escrito nos registros históricos dos reis de Judá. Na velhice Asa sofreu uma doença nos pés,

text_en: And Asa slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father: and Jehoshaphat his son reigned in his stead. {Jehoshaphat: Gr. Josaphat}
text_pt: e quando descansou com os seus antepassados, foi sepultado com eles na cidade de Davi, seu pai. E seu filho Josafá foi o seu sucessor.

text_en: And Nadab the son of Jeroboam began to reign over Israel in the second year of Asa king of Judah, and reigned over Israel two years. {began...: Heb. reigned}
text_pt: Nadabe, filho de Jeroboão, tornou-se rei de Israel no segundo ano do reinado de Asa, rei de Judá, e reinou dois anos sobre Israel.

text_en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, and walked in the way of his father, and in his sin wherewith he made Israel to sin.
text_pt: Fez o que o Senhor reprova, andando nos caminhos do seu pai e no pecado que ele tinha levado Israel a cometer.

text_en: And Baasha the son of Ahijah, of the house of Issachar, conspired against him; and Baasha smote him at Gibbethon, which {belonged} to the Philistines; for Nadab and all Israel laid siege to Gibbethon.
text_pt: Baasa, filho de Aías, da tribo de Issacar, conspirou contra ele, e o matou na cidade filistéia de Gibetom, enquanto Nadabe e todo o exército de Israel a sitiavam.

text_en: Even in the third year of Asa king of Judah did Baasha slay him, and reigned in his stead.
text_pt: Baasa matou Nadabe no terceiro ano do reinado de Asa, rei de Judá, e foi o seu sucessor.

text_en: And it came to pass, when he reigned, {that} he smote all the house of Jeroboam; he left not to Jeroboam any that breathed, until he had destroyed him, according unto the saying of the LORD, which he spake by his servant Ahijah the Shilonite:
text_pt: Assim que começou a reinar, matou toda a família de Jeroboão. Dos pertencentes a Jeroboão não deixou ninguém vivo, mas destruiu a todos, de acordo com a palavra do Senhor anunciada por seu servo, o silonita Aías.

text_en: Because of the sins of Jeroboam which he sinned, and which he made Israel sin, by his provocation wherewith he provoked the LORD God of Israel to anger.
text_pt: Isso aconteceu por causa dos pecados que Jeroboão havia cometido e havia feito Israel cometer, e porque ele tinha provocado a ira do Senhor, o Deus de Israel.

text_en: Now the rest of the acts of Nadab, and all that he did, {are} they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?
text_pt: Os demais acontecimentos do reinado de Nadabe e tudo o que fez, estão escritos nos registros históricos dos reis de Israel.

text_en: And there was war between Asa and Baasha king of Israel all their days.
text_pt: Houve guerra entre Asa e Baasa, rei de Israel, durante todo o reinado deles.

text_en: In the third year of Asa king of Judah began Baasha the son of Ahijah to reign over all Israel in Tirzah, twenty and four years.
text_pt: No terceiro ano do reinado de Asa, rei de Judá, Baasa, filho de Aías, tornou-se rei de todo o Israel, em Tirza, e reinou vinte e quatro anos.

text_en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, and walked in the way of Jeroboam, and in his sin wherewith he made Israel to sin.
text_pt: Fez o que o Senhor reprova, andando nos caminhos de Jeroboão e nos pecados que ele tinha levado Israel a cometer.

text_en: Then the word of the LORD came to Jehu the son of Hanani against Baasha, saying,
text_pt: Então a palavra do Senhor contra Baasa veio a Jeú, filho de Hanani:

text_en: Forasmuch as I exalted thee out of the dust, and made thee prince over my people Israel; and thou hast walked in the way of Jeroboam, and hast made my people Israel to sin, to provoke me to anger with their sins;
text_pt: "Eu o levantei do pó e o tornei líder de Israel, meu povo, mas você andou nos caminhos de Jeroboão e fez o meu povo pecar e provocar a minha ira por causa dos pecados deles.

text_en: Behold, I will take away the posterity of Baasha, and the posterity of his house; and will make thy house like the house of Jeroboam the son of Nebat.
text_pt: Por isso estou na iminência de destruir Baasa e a sua família, fazendo a ela o que fiz à de Jeroboão, filho de Nebate.

text_en: Him that dieth of Baasha in the city shall the dogs eat; and him that dieth of his in the fields shall the fowls of the air eat.
text_pt: Cães comerão os da família de Baasa que morrerem na cidade, e as aves do céu se alimentarão dos que morrerem no campo".

text_en: Now the rest of the acts of Baasha, and what he did, and his might, {are} they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?
text_pt: Os demais acontecimentos do reinado de Baasa, o que fez e as suas realizações, estão escritos nos registros históricos dos reis de Israel.

text_en: So Baasha slept with his fathers, and was buried in Tirzah: and Elah his son reigned in his stead.
text_pt: Baasa descansou com os seus antepassados e foi sepultado em Tirza. E seu filho Elá foi o seu sucessor.

text_en: And also by the hand of the prophet Jehu the son of Hanani came the word of the LORD against Baasha, and against his house, even for all the evil that he did in the sight of the LORD, in provoking him to anger with the work of his hands, in being like the house of Jeroboam; and because he killed him.
text_pt: A palavra do Senhor veio por meio do profeta Jeú, filho de Hanani, a Baasa e sua família, por terem feito o que o Senhor reprova, provocando a sua ira, tornando-se como a família de Jeroboão — e também porque Baasa destruiu a família de Jeroboão.

text_en: In the twenty and sixth year of Asa king of Judah began Elah the son of Baasha to reign over Israel in Tirzah, two years.
text_pt: No vigésimo sexto ano do reinado de Asa, rei de Judá, Elá, filho de Baasa, tornou-se rei de Israel, e reinou dois anos em Tirza.

text_en: And his servant Zimri, captain of half {his} chariots, conspired against him, as he was in Tirzah, drinking himself drunk in the house of Arza steward of {his} house in Tirzah. {steward...: Heb. which was over}
text_pt: Zinri, um dos seus oficiais, que comandava metade dos seus carros de guerra, conspirou contra ele. Elá estava em Tirza naquela ocasião, embriagando-se na casa de Arsa, o encarregado do palácio de Tirza.

text_en: And Zimri went in and smote him, and killed him, in the twenty and seventh year of Asa king of Judah, and reigned in his stead.
text_pt: Zinri entrou e o feriu e o matou, no vigésimo sétimo ano do reinado de Asa, rei de Judá. E foi o seu sucessor.

text_en: And it came to pass, when he began to reign, as soon as he sat on his throne, {that} he slew all the house of Baasha: he left him not one that pisseth against a wall, neither of his kinsfolks, nor of his friends. {neither...: or, both his kinsmen and his friends}
text_pt: Assim que começou a reinar, logo que se assentou no trono, eliminou toda a família de Baasa. Não poupou uma só pessoa do sexo masculino, fosse parente ou amigo.

text_en: Thus did Zimri destroy all the house of Baasha, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake against Baasha by Jehu the prophet, {by: Heb. by the hand of}
text_pt: Assim Zinri destruiu toda a família de Baasa, de acordo com a palavra do Senhor falada contra Baasa pelo profeta Jeú,

text_en: For all the sins of Baasha, and the sins of Elah his son, by which they sinned, and by which they made Israel to sin, in provoking the LORD God of Israel to anger with their vanities.
text_pt: por causa de todos os pecados que Baasa e seu filho Elá haviam cometido e levado Israel a cometer, pois, com os seus ídolos inúteis, provocaram a ira do Senhor, o Deus de Israel.

text_en: Now the rest of the acts of Elah, and all that he did, {are} they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?
text_pt: Os demais acontecimentos do reinado de Elá e tudo o que fez estão escritos nos registros históricos dos reis de Israel.

text_en: In the twenty and seventh year of Asa king of Judah did Zimri reign seven days in Tirzah. And the people {were} encamped against Gibbethon, which {belonged} to the Philistines.
text_pt: No vigésimo sétimo ano do reinado de Asa, rei de Judá, Zinri reinou sete dias em Tirza. O exército estava acampado perto da cidade filistéia de Gibetom.

text_en: And the people {that were} encamped heard say, Zimri hath conspired, and hath also slain the king: wherefore all Israel made Omri, the captain of the host, king over Israel that day in the camp.
text_pt: Quando os acampados souberam que Zinri havia conspirado contra o rei e o tinha assassinado, proclamaram ali no acampamento, naquele mesmo dia, Onri, o comandante do exército, rei sobre Israel.

text_en: And Omri went up from Gibbethon, and all Israel with him, and they besieged Tirzah.
text_pt: Então Onri e todo o seu exército saíram de Gibetom e sitiaram Tirza.

text_en: And it came to pass, when Zimri saw that the city was taken, that he went into the palace of the king's house, and burnt the king's house over him with fire, and died,
text_pt: Quando Zinri viu que a cidade tinha sido tomada, entrou na cidadela do palácio real e incendiou o palácio em torno de si, e morreu.

text_en: For his sins which he sinned in doing evil in the sight of the LORD, in walking in the way of Jeroboam, and in his sin which he did, to make Israel to sin.
text_pt: Tudo por causa dos pecados que ele havia cometido, fazendo o que o Senhor reprova e andando nos caminhos de Jeroboão e no pecado que ele tinha cometido e levado Israel a cometer.

text_en: Now the rest of the acts of Zimri, and his treason that he wrought, {are} they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?
text_pt: Os demais acontecimentos do reinado de Zinri e a rebelião que liderou estão escritos nos registros históricos dos reis de Israel.

text_en: Then were the people of Israel divided into two parts: half of the people followed Tibni the son of Ginath, to make him king; and half followed Omri.
text_pt: Então o povo de Israel dividiu-se em duas facções; metade apoiava Tibni, filho de Ginate, para fazê-lo rei, e a outra metade apoiava Onri.

text_en: But the people that followed Omri prevailed against the people that followed Tibni the son of Ginath: so Tibni died, and Omri reigned.
text_pt: Mas os seguidores de Onri revelaram-se mais fortes do que os de Tibni, filho de Ginate. E aconteceu que Tibni morreu e Onri tornou-se rei.

text_en: In the thirty and first year of Asa king of Judah began Omri to reign over Israel, twelve years: six years reigned he in Tirzah.
text_pt: No trigésimo primeiro ano do reinado de Asa, rei de Judá, Onri tornou-se rei de Israel e reinou doze anos, seis deles em Tirza.

text_en: And he bought the hill Samaria of Shemer for two talents of silver, and built on the hill, and called the name of the city which he built, after the name of Shemer, owner of the hill, Samaria. {Samaria: Heb. Shomeron}
text_pt: Por setenta quilos de prata ele comprou de Sêmer a colina de Samaria, onde construiu uma cidade, a qual chamou Samaria, por causa de Sêmer, o nome do antigo proprietário da colina.

text_en: But Omri wrought evil in the eyes of the LORD, and did worse than all that {were} before him.
text_pt: Onri, porém, fez o que o Senhor reprova e pecou mais do que todos que reinaram antes dele.

text_en: For he walked in all the way of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, and in his sin wherewith he made Israel to sin, to provoke the LORD God of Israel to anger with their vanities.
text_pt: Andou nos caminhos de Jeroboão, filho de Nebate, e no pecado que ele tinha levado Israel a cometer, e assim, com os seus ídolos inúteis, provocou a ira do Senhor, o Deus de Israel.

text_en: Now the rest of the acts of Omri which he did, and his might that he shewed, {are} they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?
text_pt: Os demais acontecimentos do reinado de Onri, o que fez e as suas realizações, tudo está escrito nos registros históricos dos reis de Israel.

text_en: So Omri slept with his fathers, and was buried in Samaria: and Ahab his son reigned in his stead.
text_pt: Onri descansou com os seus antepassados e foi sepultado em Samaria. E seu filho Acabe foi o seu sucessor.

text_en: And in the thirty and eighth year of Asa king of Judah began Ahab the son of Omri to reign over Israel: and Ahab the son of Omri reigned over Israel in Samaria twenty and two years.
text_pt: No trigésimo oitavo ano do reinado de Asa, rei de Judá, Acabe, filho de Onri, tornou-se rei de Israel, e reinou vinte e dois anos sobre Israel, em Samaria.

text_en: And Ahab the son of Omri did evil in the sight of the LORD above all that {were} before him.
text_pt: Acabe, filho de Onri, fez o que o Senhor reprova, mais do que qualquer outro antes dele.

text_en: And it came to pass, as if it had been a light thing for him to walk in the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, that he took to wife Jezebel the daughter of Ethbaal king of the Zidonians, and went and served Baal, and worshipped him. {as if...: Heb. was it a light thing, etc}
text_pt: Ele não apenas achou que não tinha importância cometer os pecados de Jeroboão, filho de Nebate, mas também se casou com Jezabel, filha de Etbaal, rei dos sidônios, e passou a prestar culto a Baal e adorá-lo.

text_en: And he reared up an altar for Baal in the house of Baal, which he had built in Samaria.
text_pt: No templo de Baal, que ele mesmo tinha construído em Samaria, Acabe ergueu um altar para Baal.

text_en: And Ahab made a grove; and Ahab did more to provoke the LORD God of Israel to anger than all the kings of Israel that were before him.
text_pt: Fez também um poste sagrado. Ele provocou a ira do Senhor, o Deus de Israel, mais do que todos os reis de Israel antes dele.

text_en: In his days did Hiel the Bethelite build Jericho: he laid the foundation thereof in Abiram his firstborn, and set up the gates thereof in his youngest {son} Segub, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake by Joshua the son of Nun.
text_pt: Durante o seu reinado, Hiel, de Betel, reconstruiu Jericó. Lançou os alicerces à custa do seu filho mais velho, Abirão, e instalou as suas portas à custa do seu filho mais novo, Segube, de acordo com a palavra que o Senhor tinha falado por meio de Josué, filho de Num.
